Mesorregiao.title: Mesorregiao
Mesorregiao.description: Represents a mesoregion within the state of Maranhão, used for geographical data filtering and analysis in the survey.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Mesorregiao entity.

stateName.description: The name of the state to which this mesoregion belongs. For this application, it is implicitly 'Maranhão'.

Cidade.title: Cidade
Cidade.description: Represents a city within a mesoregion in Maranhão, used for geographical data filtering and analysis in the survey.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Cidade entity.

mesorregiaoId.description: Reference to the Mesorregiao entity this city belongs to. (Relationship: Mesorregiao 1:N Cidade)

stateName.description: The name of the state to which this city belongs. For this application, it is implicitly 'Maranhão'.

SurveyRecord.title: SurveyRecord
SurveyRecord.description: Represents an individual response record from the embedded survey data, including demographic information and specific responses related to approval ratings and satisfaction levels.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SurveyRecord entity.

age.description: The age of the survey respondent, or an identifier for their age group.

gender.description: The gender of the survey respondent (e.g., 'Masculino', 'Feminino', 'Outro').

educationLevel.description: The highest education level attained by the survey respondent.

employmentStatus.description: The employment status of the survey respondent.

householdIncome.description: The household income bracket of the survey respondent.

politicalAlignment.description: The self-declared political alignment or preference of the survey respondent.

satisfactionWithGovernment.description: The respondent's satisfaction level with the current government (e.g., 'Aprova', 'Desaprova', 'Não Sabe').

satisfactionWithEconomy.description: The respondent's satisfaction level with the current economic situation.

satisfactionWithHealthcare.description: The respondent's satisfaction level with healthcare services.

candidatePreference.description: The respondent's preferred candidate or political figure, if applicable. This field may be null or absent if not relevant for the survey record.

mesorregiaoId.description: Reference to the Mesorregiao entity where the respondent resides. (Relationship: Mesorregiao 1:N SurveyRecord)

cidadeId.description: Reference to the Cidade entity where the respondent resides. (Relationship: Cidade 1:N SurveyRecord)

surveyDate.description: The date when this specific survey record was collected or recorded.

definition.description: Stores information about each mesoregion in Maranhão. Publicly readable.

params.name: mesorregiaoId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific Mesorregiao document.

definition.description: Stores information about each city. Publicly readable.

params.name: cidadeId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific Cidade document.

definition.description: Stores individual survey responses imported via the admin panel. Publicly readable for dashboard stats.

params.name: responseId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific survey response.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is updated to support the transition from embedded data to dynamic database-driven analysis. The 'surveyResponses' collection is now the primary source for the dashboard, allowing for real-time updates and easier data management via the import tool.
